top_signals.title: Yum Brands sells Pizza Hut to private equity firm LongRange Capital and Yum China for $2.7 billion
top_signals.summary: Yum Brands is selling Pizza Hut, capping off years of struggles for the pizza chain.

top_signals.title: Agreement Secures Continued Rail Ferry Service from Sweden to Germany
top_signals.summary: Stena Line has signed an agreement with the Swedish Transport Administration (Trafikverket) that secures the continued operation of rail ferry services between Sweden and Germany. The agreement, the first of its kind, ensures that traffic on…

top_signals.title: Europe Needs 65-Ship CO2 Fleet by 2050 to Support CCS Growth, Xodus Finds
top_signals.summary: Europe will require a dedicated fleet of around 65 CO2 carriers and a network of 33 ports by 2050 to support the large-scale deployment of carbon capture, utilization and storage (CCUS), according to a new study led by energy consultancy Xodus.The CCUS Enabling Infrastructure Study…
